message:
feat(multi-engine-harness): add parser telemetry subsystem with throughput and latency tracking

Introduce ParserTelemetrySample/Accumulator/Summary for per-parse timing,
throughput (sources/sec, MiB/sec), latency percentiles (p50/p95/p99),
ns-per-token, allocs-per-token, and peak RSS collection from canonical
engine runs.

Add allocation estimation helpers (estimate_syntax_tree_allocation_count,
estimate_statement_allocation_count, estimate_expression_allocation_count),
lexical token counting (estimate_lexical_token_count), /proc/self/status
RSS reading (Linux), quantile computation, and ratio calculation.

Harden integration tests with assertions on repro-pack provenance hash,
minimized source hash, minimization bounds, and promotion hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
